Young Mothers

Jeunes mères

6.5
2025MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Housed in a shelter for young mothers, Jessica, Perla, Julia, Ariane, and Naïma, all of whom have grown up in difficult circumstances, struggle to obtain a better life for themselves and their children.

young mother
